title: No Potion Particles
description: Disables the annoying effect particle that sometimes hide your view.
body:
This will disable the potion particle, this can limit lag and will prevent the annoying particles that float around you. You will not be able to see a player in invis and to see when a player has potion effect on. 

This texture pack is recommended for KitPvp or Fast Pvp Duels.
